title: people — published events
description: CENTRAL-plane events — dispatched on the central connection's queue. LinkRequested is the load-bearing signal that fires guardian consent notifications. LinkApproved triggers tenant-side prefill of the local Athlete/Staff record with the consented shareable subset. PersonVerified elevates the identity so future lookups return verified=true; frozen identities refuse all new link requests.

events.name: PersonRegistered
events.trigger: New PersonIdentity committed with academorix_id assigned. Fires on both self-registration (via central signup) and admin creation.

events.name: PersonVerified
events.trigger: PersonIdentity.verification_status flipped to 'verified' by platform staff. All active tenant link references gain verified=true in their next resolution.

events.name: PersonUpdated
events.trigger: PersonIdentity mutated (legal_name / dob / nationality). Notifies all tenants with active links so they can refresh their local prefill.

events.name: LinkRequested
events.trigger: P1 event. Tenant filed a TenantLinkRequest for a PersonIdentity. Fires consent notification to guardians via central-URL.

events.name: LinkApproved
events.trigger: P1 event. Guardian approved a TenantLinkRequest + selected shareable fields. Cascades to the requesting tenant's local Athlete/Staff prefill.
consumers: people::PropagateLinkPrefillToTenant (async cross-tenant push of consented fields)

payload.consenting_guardian_person_identity_id: ULID | null (null when the person is an adult approving for themselves)

events.name: LinkDeclined
events.trigger: Guardian declined a TenantLinkRequest. Tenant may proceed with fresh local Athlete/Staff without link.

events.name: LinkRevoked
events.trigger: P1 event. Guardian revoked a previously-approved link. Stops future sync but preserves what the receiving tenant already created (per GDPR + local retention).
consumers: people::MarkTenantReferenceStaleJob (async signal to tenant DB — local data preserved)

events.name: GuardianLinkAdded
events.trigger: New PersonGuardianLink committed between two PersonIdentities. Cross-tenant portable — every tenant with either identity linked sees the guardian relationship on next resolution.

events.name: GuardianLinkRemoved
events.trigger: PersonGuardianLink revoked. Cross-tenant propagation — active links may be affected.
